value_chain_position: Global payment network operator; owns Mastercard/Maestro/Cirrus rails plus Vocalink A2A infrastructure, taking per-transaction tolls across card and account-to-account flows.
relative_comps: Mastercard is the direct duopoly peer to Visa: 52% FCF margin on $33.9B TTM revenue, 14% CAGR / 17% YoY. MA is slightly faster-growing than V recently, aided by cross-border volume recovery and value-added services (cybersecurity, data analytics) layered on the core rail. Trades at a modest discount to Visa on FCF multiple given smaller float. Vocalink gives MA a strategic toe-hold in A2A/real-time payments which Visa lacks at comparable scale — a genuine differentiation in the medium term.
